name: Whisper Fine-Tuning Run
short_description: Train a domain-adapted Whisper checkpoint on Rezolve production audio and evaluate on gold-92.
detailed_description: Covers tasks that prepare a training split from DVC-tracked production audio, run supervised fine-tuning of a Whisper-class model (locally on Mac Metal via MPS or on an Azure H100 VM), and evaluate the checkpoint on gold-92 for entity accuracy, WER regression, and latency. Tasks must include a data-scale experiment or ablation so the minimum-viable dataset size can be estimated. Gold-92 is held out strictly for evaluation — never included in training or validation.
